channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Dortmund scores 7 while Barcelona, Man City and Arsenal all win in Champions League
item.description: Karim Adeyemi starred as Borussia Dortmund ran riot against Celtic while Barcelona and Manchester City claimed their first wins in the restructured Champions League on Tuesday. Adeyemi scored a first-half hat trick as Dortmund routed Celtic 7-1 at home.
item.dc:creator: CIARÁN FAHEY, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Keith Olbermann supports USA Today columnist after WNBPA's statement: 'You should close your union'
item.description: Several days after the WNBPA called out Christine Brennan for fueling "racist, homophobic, and misogynistic vitriol" in an interview, a fellow media member defended her.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NFL, players association launch review after Bengals' Chase Brown appears to get doused by fan’s drink
item.description: Second-year running back Chase Brown's memorable day was marred by a drink-throwing incident shortly after the Cincinnati Bengals earned their first win of the NFL season.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Oakland A’s are gone, but legacy lives on during MLB playoffs
item.description: Eleven of the 12 teams in the playoffs have direct ties to the Oakland A's, and they gave it a shot with the Yankees' Aaron Judge.
item.dc:creator: Laurence Miedema, The Mercury News

item.title: NHL season has international flavor with the 4 Nations Face-off as a Winter Olympics appetizer
item.description: While a vast majority of the 1,312 NHL games through June will take place in North America, the spotlight this season is on international play.
item.dc:creator: Stephen Whyno, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: WWE ring collapses during last monster standing match
item.description: WWE Raw saw Braun Strowman and Bronson Reed collapse the ring during a last monster stranding match on Monday night. Seth Rollins also returned.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: As NFL scouts flock to campus, Big Ten players seek to catch their eye
item.description: ANN ARBOR, Mich. (AP) — NFL scouts filled an entire row of the Michigan Stadium press box to get a look at some of the top prospects in the upcoming draft when the Wolverines beat Southern California two weeks ago.
item.dc:creator: LARRY LAGE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Legendary Dodgers pitcher, broadcaster Fernando Valenzuela hospitalized
item.description: Dodgers broadcaster Fernando Valenzuela has been hospitalized ahead of the team's playoff run. The popular Spanish-language broadcaster and former Dodger star pitcher stepped away from his playcalling duties last week, though no reason was given at the time, according to the Orange County Register.
item.dc:creator: Cameron Kiszla, KTLA 5

item.title: Sinner to play Alcaraz in China Open final and Osaka out with back injury
item.description: BEIJING (AP) — Top-ranked Jannik Sinner will play rival Carlos Alcaraz in the final of the China Open after recording a 6-3, 7-6 (3) victory over home favorite Bu Yunchaokete on Tuesday. Sinner and Alcaraz accounted for all four Grand Slam titles this year between them.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Are professional athletes playing too many games?
item.description: Fans, athletes and medical experts have been having discussions on the increasing demand for players starting from the time they first start playing, all the way up to the professional ranks.
item.dc:creator: Juan Cisneros, Fox 5

item.title: Homer Glen native CM Punk reflects on wrestling's past, future on the eve of NXT's CW Network debut from Rosemont
item.description: On the eve of WWE NXT's debut on the CW Network, superstar CM Punk reflected on the professional wrestling industry's past, present, and future.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, WGN 9

item.title: Appreciation: Dikembe Mutombo, a Basketball Hall of Fame player, had impact far beyond the game
item.description: The finger wag. The enormous smile. The unmistakable voice. Dikembe Mutombo played defense at a level and with a flair that few others in basketball history ever possessed, all among the many reasons why he's immortalized in the Hall of Fame. On the court, he stopped people.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: MLB's season turns to October competition, where legacies and fortunes can be made
item.description: Japanese superstar Shohei Ohtani has put up some of the best regular-season numbers in baseball history over the past six months. Bobby Witt Jr. is a precocious 24-year-old who just won the American League batting title. They've both proven they are excellent at baseball.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: What to know about the Padres Wild Card Series at Petco Park
item.description: If you are heading to the game, here are some things to know about the best-of-three National League Wild Card Series matchup between the Padres and Atlanta Braves:
item.dc:creator: Domenick Candelieri, Fox 5

item.title: McMahon 'incriminated himself' in Netflix doc: Vince Russo
item.description: "I don't feel like there was an agenda or a narrative," Russo said exclusively on "Banfield." Unfortunately, Vince's issue is he incriminated himself.
item.dc:creator: Liz Jassin, NewsNation

item.title: Utah Jazz veterans hope to lead young core
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - There are no less than ten players 23 years of age or younger currently on the Utah Jazz roster. So for veterans like Jordan Clarkson, they know their role as leaders is invaluable.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Titans quarterback Will Levis injures shoulder in the 1st quarter against the Dolphins
item.description: MIAMI GARDENS, Fla. (AP) — Tennessee Titans quarterback Will Levis left Monday's 31-12 win over the Miami Dolphins in the first quarter with a shoulder injury. Levis dove for a first down on Tennessee's second drive of the game and came down hard on his right throwing shoulder.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Sitake wants to keep BYU hungry during bye week
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Coming off a 34-28 win at Baylor, #17 BYU is 5-0 for the first time in three years. But head coach Kalani Sitake is going to make sure his team keeps its underdog mentality during the bye week. "That's our job," Sitake said Monday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Favre tries to expand his defamation lawsuit against Mississippi auditor over welfare spending
item.description: Favre is not facing criminal charges, but he is among more than three dozen people or businesses the state is suing to try to recover misspent money through the Temporary Assistance for Needy Families program.
item.dc:creator: EMILY WAGSTER PETTUS, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: The final day for the Oakland Athletics arrives ahead of next season's move away from the Bay
item.description: SEATTLE (AP) — When manager Mark Kotsay removed his Oakland jersey for the final time Sunday, it was bound for the Baseball Hall of Fame. Brent Rooker? His final jersey with the name Oakland across the front will be preserved in a frame and displayed on his wall at home.
item.dc:creator: TIM BOOTH, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: WWE NXT heads to Chicago for live debut on CW Network
item.description: The event marks a significant moment for WWE NXT as it expands its reach to a broader audience on the CW Network.
item.dc:creator: Kenny Morales, NewsNation

item.title: RSL gives up another late goal, settles for 2-2 draw
item.description: AUSTIN, Tex. (ABC4 Sports) - For the second straight game, Real Salt Lake looked like it had victory in its grasp. But for the second straight game, RSL gave up a late goal and had to settle for a draw.
item.dc:creator: ABC 4

item.title: SJSU opponent forfeits volleyball match, lawsuit alleges player is transgender
item.description: (KRON) -- Boise State University's volleyball team forfeited a match against San Jose State, the school announced on Friday. The cancellation came after one San Jose State player said in a lawsuit that one of her teammates is transgender.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Photos: Inside Oakland Coliseum for A's final game
item.description: OAKLAND, Calif. (KRON) -- Thursday marked an end of an era for Major League Baseball in Oakland. More than 45,000 passionate Athletics fans watched their team's final game at Oakland Coliseum.
item.dc:creator: Amy Larson, KRON4

item.title: It's official: This Los Angeles Angels team is the worst in franchise history
item.description: The Los Angeles Angels, in their 64th season in franchise history, made history on Thursday — just not the good kind.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Derrick Rose, Chicago native and NBA MVP with the Bulls, announces retirement from pro basketball after 16 seasons
item.description: CHICAGO — Derrick Rose, a Chicago native and city basketball legend in every sense of the word, is retiring from professional basketball. Rose, who grew up in Englewood on the city's Southwest Side and was a prep star at Simeon before being drafted No.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Ohtani's 50th home run ball heads to auction
item.description: The historic 50th home run ball hit by Los Angeles Dodgers superstar Shohei Ohtani is heading to auction later this week, and the starting bid is already at half a million dollars.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: Brett Favre says Parkinson's diagnosis came after struggles with his right arm
item.description: Brett Favre revealed Tuesday that he had been diagnosed with Parkinson's disease while speaking to a congressional committee.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: 49ers star RB Christian McCaffrey heads to Germany to see a specialist for his Achilles injury
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — San Francisco 49ers All-Pro running back Christian McCaffrey went to Germany to consult with a specialist about his Achilles tendinitis.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Cody Bellinger drives in 4 runs in the Cubs' 10-4 win over the Phillies
item.description: Cody Bellinger tripled, singled twice and drove in four runs, and the Chicago Cubs routed the Philadelphia Phillies 10-4 on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9
